nl_query: Show the complete question hierarchy for the Data Structures paper, including section names, question codes, ltree paths, max marks, attempt rule types, and group labels, highlighting any questions that lack a rubric in the approved answer key.
failed_sql:
SELECT qs.id AS section_id, qs.name, q.id AS question_id, q.code, q.path, q.level, q.max_marks, ar.rule_type, arg.group_label, ak.id AS answer_key_id, ak.status, ak.approved_by, ak.approved_at
FROM   question_paper   qp
JOIN   question_section  qs ON qs.qp_id = qp.id
JOIN   question          q  ON q.section_id = qs.id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = q.script_id
JOIN   attempt_rule ar ON ar.question_id = q.id
JOIN   attempt_rule_group arg ON arg.attempt_rule_id = ar.id
LEFT JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.qp_id = qp.id
WHERE  qp.title = 'Data Structures'
  AND  ak.status = 'APPROVED'
GROUP BY qs.id, qs.name, q.id, q.code, q.path, q.level, q.max_marks, ar.rule_type, arg.group_label, ak.id, ak.status, ak.approved_by, ak.approved_at
ORDER BY qs.display_order, q.path;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): question.script_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
